name: Card Market shows shared decks or a join-a-party prompt
description: A logged-in user opens /app/card-market and sees the Card Market heading with guidance about browsing and importing flashcard decks. The page shows either shared decks (or a no-decks-yet message) when in a party, or a prompt to join a party with a link to the Friends page. Either outcome is valid; a 404 or blank page is not.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading

Verify the page renders the 'Card Market' heading (not a 404 or blank screen) and shows one of two valid states: EITHER a shared-deck browsing area (a deck list or an explicit no-decks-yet message) when the account is in a party, OR a prompt explaining a study group is needed with a link to the Friends page. A broken or empty container with no heading is a failure.
